spec.title: Online devices
spec.description: How many selected ESP32 targets are currently scrapeable.

spec.title: Living room minus balcony humidity
spec.description: Positive value means the living room humidity is higher than the balcony.

spec.title: Scrape status by device
spec.description: Prometheus scrape status for each selected ESP32.

spec.title: Wi-Fi connected by device
spec.description: Wi-Fi connection state reported by firmware.

spec.title: RSSI now
spec.description: Wi-Fi signal strength. Closer to 0 is better.

spec.title: Free heap now
spec.description: Current free heap per device.

spec.title: Wi-Fi RSSI over time
spec.description: Signal trend. Useful for checking balcony signal stability.

spec.title: Free heap over time
spec.description: Useful for spotting memory leaks or fragmentation.

spec.title: Wi-Fi connected state over time
spec.description: 0 means disconnected, 1 means connected.

spec.title: Prometheus scrape health over time
spec.description: 0 means Prometheus could not scrape the device.

spec.title: Uptime by device
spec.description: Uptime resets indicate device reboot.

spec.title: Temperature now
spec.description: Current temperature per device.

spec.title: Temperature change rate
spec.description: Rate of temperature change in °C per hour.

spec.title: Humidity change rate
spec.description: Rate of humidity change in percent points per hour.

spec.title: Pressure trend
spec.description: Pressure change rate in mmHg per hour.

spec.title: Temperature spread between selected devices
spec.description: Difference between the warmest and coldest selected sensors.

spec.expr: max(esp32_sensor_temperature{job="esp32", device=~"$device", room=~"$room", instance=~"$instance"}) - min(esp32_sensor_temperature{job="esp32", device=~"$device", room=~"$room", instance=~"$instance"})

spec.title: Humidity spread between selected devices
spec.description: Difference between the most and least humid selected sensors.

spec.expr: max(esp32_sensor_humidity{job="esp32", device=~"$device", room=~"$room", instance=~"$instance"}) - min(esp32_sensor_humidity{job="esp32", device=~"$device", room=~"$room", instance=~"$instance"})

spec.title: Indoor comfort humidity band
spec.description: Living room humidity. Practical comfort band is usually around 40–60%.

spec.title: Humidity now
spec.description: Current relative humidity per device.

spec.title: Pressure now
spec.description: Current pressure converted from hPa to mmHg.

spec.title: Temperature by device
spec.description: Raw temperature from each ESP32 sensor.

spec.title: Humidity by device
spec.description: Relative humidity from each ESP32 sensor.

spec.title: Pressure by device
spec.description: Pressure converted from hPa to mmHg.

spec.title: Living room minus balcony temperature
spec.description: Positive value means the living room is warmer than the balcony.
